サングラスと帽子を忘れずに
zh: 建议选择空调良好的住宿

clothingAdvice.ko: 반팔, 반바지, 가벼운 원피스. 통풍 잘 되는 소재 추천
clothingAdvice.en: T-shirts, shorts, light dresses. Breathable fabrics recommended

clothingAdvice.zh: 短袖、短裤、轻便连衣裙，推荐透气材质

summary.en: High temperatures but it's peak beach season
